lessons.trigger: mission has a storefront that states a price AND a separate economics or implementation track
lessons.lesson: Carry the single chosen price into BOTH the website-build brief and the implementation brief in the same wave. When only one gets it, the PDP price and the economics model drift and the auditor blocks the build gate.

evidence.what_happened: Seed lesson shipped with the template to show the shape of a real entry. It is a true engine failure mode (the build gate exists to catch exactly this). Retire it once real lessons accumulate.
